sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100322" key="sunepisfa/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπι-σφάζω</orth>, <sense id="n100322.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kill besides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0655.tlg001.perseus-grc1:6:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Parth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.6</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
